name: alloflow-desktop
description: AlloFlow desktop (Electron) app. Split out of the repo-root package.json on 2026-07-04 so the web/CDN build (Cloudflare Pages runs `npm ci` at the repo root) never installs Electron, which was freezing the CDN build. Run `npm install` in THIS directory for desktop dev/packaging. NOTE: scripts run with cwd=desktop/ now — if any build script assumed the repo root, adjust its paths (main.cjs already uses module-relative requires, so runtime is fine). Packaging config lives HERE as electron-builder.json (paths relative to desktop/); the old repo-root electron-builder.desktop.json is the pre-split original and is superseded.

scripts.package:win: npm run icon:build && npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --x64 --arm64
scripts.package:win:ci: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:ci: npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:win-arm64: npm run icon:build && npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --arm64
scripts.package:win-x64: npm run icon:build && npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --x64
scripts.package:mac: npm run icon:build && npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.package:mac-arm64: npm run icon:build && npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.package:mac-x64: npm run icon:build && npm run web:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip --x64

author: AlloFlow
